name: wiki0
description: Local-first AI memory as a Markdown wiki backed by SQLite search and MCP tools
author: Scott Spence <me@scottspence.com>

scripts.build: pnpm --filter "./packages/*" run build:self && pnpm --filter wiki0-web run build
scripts.check: pnpm --filter "./packages/*" run build:self && pnpm --filter "./packages/*" run check:self && pnpm --filter wiki0-web run check
scripts.format: vp check --fix && pnpm --filter wiki0-web exec vp check --fix
scripts.lint: vp lint && pnpm --filter wiki0-web run lint
scripts.test: pnpm --filter "./packages/*" --if-present run test:self && pnpm --filter wiki0-web run test
